events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have turned 63 today.

angles.name: Tribute to George Michael
angles.copy: Today, we're remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have been 63. His music continues to uplift and inspire. What's your favourite track from the legend?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: It's 17 years today since the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who passed away at the age of 50.

angles.name: Remembering Michael Jackson
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we said goodbye to the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music and artistry continue to transcend generations. What's the MJ track that always gets you moving?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr!

angles.name: Ringo's Big Day
angles.copy: Putting a spotlight on a true legend today! Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian May
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and all-round rock god. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video, changing music forever.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. It truly changed everything! What's your most memorable MTV moment?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring anthems like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'? A game-changer for British music. What's your favourite track from this legendary debut?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the iconic Woodstock Festival began. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago today.

angles.name: Tribute to Elvis
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the one and only Elvis Presley. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: It's 30 years today since the hip-hop world tragically lost Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, we lost a true icon of hip-hop, Tupac Shakur. His influence is still felt across music and culture today. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago today.

angles.name: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, the world lost a musical pioneer, Jimi Hendrix. His guitar wizardry remains unmatched. What's your favourite Hendrix moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles walked across that zebra crossing and gave us 'Abbey Road'. A masterpiece from start to finish. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Happy 54th birthday to the iconic Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam
angles.copy: The one and only Liam Gallagher turns 54 today! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on September 9, 1971, in the US and October 24, 1971, in the UK.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A song that continues to resonate with its message of peace and unity. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How did the iPod change your music listening habits?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! We're celebrating 007 with all the iconic theme tunes. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Tribute to John Lennon
angles.copy: Today, we're honouring the incredible legacy of John Lennon, who would have been 86. His music and message continue to inspire millions. What's your favourite Lennon song?
